author: DominicVainMod

@everyone

Star Atlas Stress Test - LIVE

It's time to help us create Star Atlas history!

Join our live stress test NOW, targeting 1,000 concurrent players in a single lobby!  

How to join:
 Launch Star Atlas on the Epic Games Store (Note: The game may crash when trying to connect, keep trying and it will work.)
 Press Play
 Launch the "MetaGravity test"

 | https://store.epicgames.com/en-US/p/star-atlas-bead34
